objective: Guide founders from idea generation to MVP, launch, and scale while filtering weak ideas, preventing AI-amplified bad prototypes, and selecting valuable prototypes using evidence-bound gates.
required_evidence: payment, booking, referral, or repeated-use signals

gates.name: idea_gate
gates.pass_condition: At least 10 target-user evidence items, with at least 6 showing pain or current workaround and at least 3 showing budget, schedule, reuse, or migration intent.

gates.name: mvp_gate
gates.pass_condition: At least 5 target users test the MVP, at least 2 complete the core behavior and show reuse, booking, or payment intent, with real operation evidence.

gates.name: launch_gate
gates.pass_condition: At least two non-vanity signals meet predeclared thresholds across activation, D7 retention, repeat usage, payment, booking, or referral.

gates.name: scale_gate
gates.pass_condition: Unit economics are stable or improving, delivery quality is measurable, support cost is controlled, and agentic workflows include failure states and human approvals.

execution_constraints: Do not use fallback outputs to hide failure.
Do not call scripts agents unless LLM-backed decision authority exists.
Human approval is required before MVP build, public launch, and scale expansion.
